role_summary: responsible for managing end -to-end accounting operations and ensuring statutory and  regulatory compliance.
responsibilities: • oversee ac counting processes and monthly closures   • ensure compliance with companies act, gst, income tax, and other laws   • prepare financial statements and mis reports   • coordinate with auditors and regulators   • maintain accounting controls and documentation   • lead complianc e audits and reviews
qualifications: • ca qualification   • strong accounting and compliance knowledge   • experience with erp/accounting systems   • process management and coordination skills
